name: Blog creator in brand voice using AI
description: Scrapes existing blog posts from a website to learn brand voice, then uses Claude AI to generate a new blog post matching that style, and posts the result to Slack.

source.originalName: Automate blog creation in brand voice with AI

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping existing blog posts

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the generated blog

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the generated blog draft

blogUrl.description: URL of an existing blog post to learn brand voice from (e.g. 'https://company.com/blog/sample-post')

blogTopic.description: Topic for the new blog post to generate (e.g. 'How AI is transforming customer support')

targetAudience.description: Target audience for the blog post

steps.name: Scrape existing blog post for brand voice
Extract brand voice characteristics from scraped content
Build AI prompt for brand voice analysis and blog generation
Run Claude AI to analyze voice and generate blog
Build Slack Block Kit message with blog draft
